conclusion: Academic saturation is not established in wave 5. OpenAlex direct/citation and arXiv repository rounds completed with full dispositions and 0% net-new accepted unique yield, but the Crossref round surfaced one plausible net-new named-organization source. It is not ingested and remains blocked for manager review, making that round ineligible. Three consecutive eligible rounds therefore do not exist.
acceptance_boundary: Only identifiable named-organization evidence of an implemented learning or improvement mechanism qualifies. Generic theory, aggregate surveys, anonymous or pseudonymous cases, and generic tooling do not qualify.
